content: H1: Eliminar segunda instancia duplicada de MarketComparatorPanel
H2: Auto-fill + input editable para detected_price cuando no viene del pick
H3: Vista readonly del payload + MISSING_* específicos
H4/H5: Screenshot UI + discovery 365Scores game_id documentado
I3: Integración con engine + 3 series persistidas (p_dc_original/p_market_devig/p_residual_final)
I4: Script run_d9_residual_backtest.py con walk-forward + bootstrap delta
I5: 11 tests verde — PIT discipline + signal learning + identity fallback + serialisation
